---
title: "Methodology and Initial Results"
---

This page summarizes the current canonical methodology and first validated artifact set committed on **2026-03-08**.

## Methodology (Current)

1. Define canonical run families in `config/canonical_run_matrix.csv`.
2. Generate paired transport Monte Carlo bundles for dry and refrigerated analyses.
3. Build merged LCI outputs and completeness audits.
4. Build presentation artifacts (figures/tables/reduced-data + route animations).
5. Run final validation (`tools/validate_final_artifacts.sh`) and release manifest generation.

Validation gates (latest canonical snapshot):
- Pair 2-member invariant: PASS
- Figure quality checks: PASS
- Required merged LCI files: PASS

## Initial Results Snapshot

Release readiness source:
- `artifacts/github_release/canonical_2026-03-08/manifest/release_readiness_report.md`

Key completeness counts:
- LCI rows: `4160`
- Placeholder rows: `2240` (non-transport unresolved placeholders remain explicit)

### Core Transport Metrics (co2_per_1000kcal)

| Product Type | Origin Network | Traffic | CO2 per 1000 kcal |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| Dry | Dry factory set | Stochastic | 517.93 |
| Dry | Refrigerated factory set | Stochastic | 518.99 |
| Refrigerated | Dry factory set | Stochastic | 584.07 |
| Refrigerated | Refrigerated factory set | Stochastic | 578.91 |

## Figures (Initial)

### Dry: Transport Emissions Comparison

![](assets/transport/canonical_2026-03-08/analysis_core_dry_fig_a_transport_emissions_comparison.png)

### Refrigerated: Transport Emissions Comparison

![](assets/transport/canonical_2026-03-08/analysis_core_refrigerated_fig_a_transport_emissions_comparison.png)

### Refrigerated: Delivery Time by Scenario

![](assets/transport/canonical_2026-03-08/analysis_core_refrigerated_fig_c1_delivery_time_by_scenario.png)

### Route Animation (Last Frame Preview)

![](assets/transport/canonical_2026-03-08/route_animation_diesel_vs_bev_last_frame.png)

## Artifact Locations

Tracked GitHub-ready snapshot:
- `artifacts/github_release/canonical_2026-03-08/`

## Roadmap Note

Current route animations are primarily latitude/longitude playback with cumulative counters.

Planned upgrades:
- Add richer basemap/corridor context.
- Add event overlays (charging, refuel, delays, stop windows).
- Add stronger scenario and powertrain narrative callouts.
